'''pazawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycovirus|mycovirus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycovirus|mycovirus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pazawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzæwæth|pæzæwæth]] || [[word:pæzæwæj|pæzæwæj]] || [[word:pæzæwæsh|pæzæwæsh]] || [[word:pæzæwæ|pæzæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazazawath|pazazawath]] || [[word:pazazawaj|pazazawaj]] || [[word:pazazawash|pazazawash]] || [[word:pazazawa|pazazawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazawath|pazawath]] || [[word:pazawaj|pazawaj]] || [[word:pazawash|pazawash]] || [[word:pazawa|pazawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazafwath|pazafwath]] || [[word:pazafwaj|pazafwaj]] || [[word:pazafwash|pazafwash]] || [[word:pazafwaf|pazafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazawatha|pazawatha]] || [[word:pazawaja|pazawaja]] || [[word:pazawasha|pazawasha]] || [[word:pazawaka|pazawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazawath|pazawath]] || [[word:pazawaj|pazawaj]] || [[word:pazawash|pazawash]] || [[word:pazawa|pazawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazawathal|pazawathal]] || [[word:pazawajal|pazawajal]] || [[word:pazawashal|pazawashal]] || [[word:pazawakal|pazawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazawathatha|pazawathatha]] || [[word:pazawajaja|pazawajaja]] || [[word:pazawashasha|pazawashasha]] || [[word:pazawaka|pazawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazawathan|pazawathan]] || [[word:pazawajan|pazawajan]] || [[word:pazawashan|pazawashan]] || [[word:pazawakan|pazawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazawathaoro|pazawathaoro]] || [[word:pazawajaoro|pazawajaoro]] || [[word:pazawashaoro|pazawashaoro]] || [[word:pazawakaoro|pazawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
